title: INFANTINO My 1st Tumbler – Adorable Miniature Tumbler with Leak-Resistant Straw and Toddler-Friendly Handle, Encourages Hydration, Easy to Clean, 9 fl. oz, Ocean
features: BABY-FRIENDLY & STYLISH: Designed for little hands, this silicone 9oz (255 ml) tumbler with handle combines functionality and style in a compact size, encouraging babies to drink independently and stay hydrated while looking as fashionable as their mummy

LEAK-RESISTANT STRAW: The straw features a soft silicone tip and integrated valve that offers a consistent flow of liquid while preventing spills—even when the tumbler is turned upside down! When the straw is secured, it cannot be pulled out by curious little fingers, but it can be taken apart by parents for thorough cleaning

EASY-TO-HOLD HANDLE: Equipped with a handy handle, this lightweight tumbler is easy to carry and promotes hydration wherever adventure takes your baby. Whether at playtime or heading out for the day, your baby will love reaching for their tumbler. It fits in most stroller and car seat cupholders, and for added convenience, it can also be placed in your diaper bag's bottle holder—perfect for on-the-go travel!

EFFORTLESS CLEANING: Maintenance is simple with easy-to-separate components for thorough cleaning —wash with warm, soapy water or place on the top rack of your dishwasher. This means less time cleaning and more time making memories with your family

INFANTINO, SMARTLY DESIGNED PRODUCTS FOR HAPPY PARENTING: We design smartly, we have fun, and we're overjoyed when an idea evolves full circle into a product loved and used daily by parents everywhere
